summary: Phase 4A FE retest iter 258 (FE-2, FE-4..FE-8). After applying iter 257's documented workaround (select a single branch, hide dedupe-pill-wrapper) on /sales-new with Juan Dela Cruz 633c26 + Edge Item 22be6e + Sale Date today, the Checkout button (button:has-text('Checkout')) STILL does not open the [role=dialog] (Phase 4A Checkout dialog) — verified across Main Warehouse, Branch 1, Branch 2, Central Store, Main Branch (5 different single-branch scopes). Without the dialog, PaymentType tabs are unreachable so FE-2, FE-4, FE-5, FE-6, FE-7 and FE-8 cannot be exercised end-to-end. Banner / reason inputs were never reached because their visibility hinges on paymentType=='credit', which is itself only settable from inside the Checkout dialog. Additionally observed a NEW header notification on Main Warehouse: '6 unclosed days detected (2026-05-03 to 2026-05-08)' which may be silently blocking checkout, and the Credit tab inside the dialog (when it did transiently open in attempt 1) was not findable via [role=tab]:has-text('Credit') nor button:has-text('Credit') within [role=dialog] — suggesting the PaymentType Tabs are rendered with a different structure than role=tab, contradicting the iter 257 hand-off note. Same dedupe-pill-wrapper interception bug from iter 257 still present.

ui_bugs.issue: Checkout button click does NOT open the [role=dialog] checkout in any single-branch scope (verified 5/5 branches). No toast surfaces. document.querySelector('[role=dialog]') returns null after click+2.5s wait. Probable causes: (a) silent guard from 'unclosed days detected' banner blocking checkout, (b) cart validation failing silently, (c) dialog mounted but role attribute missing. Without dialog, paymentType cannot be flipped to credit and FE-2/4/5/6/7/8 are not testable.

When dialog DID transiently open in early attempt, the Credit tab was not findable via [role=tab]:has-text('Credit') nor button:has-text('Credit') within [role=dialog] (4s timeout). The handoff doc said 'Tabs use [role=tab] structure' but this appears not to be the case — likely shadcn Tabs not rendered or button tabs use a different label.

Main Warehouse shows '6 unclosed days detected (2026-05-03 to 2026-05-08)' banner. If this is a soft block on Checkout, that alone can explain why the dialog never opens — needs verification by main agent.

Floating 'dedupe-pill-wrapper' (z-[60], fixed bottom-right) STILL intercepts pointer events over Checkout button + cart panel. Same as iter 257; no fix applied. Worked around with display:none JS in this iteration.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot reach POST /api/historical-credit/preview or POST /api/historical-credit because Checkout dialog precondition fails. No 403 approval_invalid response could be observed for FE-8.

fe_test_results.FE-2: BLOCKED — banner not reachable; Checkout dialog never opens so paymentType cannot be set to credit. Even when Sale Date is set to -14d on its own (without flipping paymentType), historical-credit-banner does NOT render (correct behaviour: banner gates on isHistoricalCreditMode = backdated AND credit).
fe_test_results.FE-4: BLOCKED — same as FE-2. historical-credit-reason/proof-url/notebook-ref inputs are children of the banner.
fe_test_results.FE-5: BLOCKED — confirm-payment is inside the Checkout dialog; dialog never opens.
fe_test_results.FE-6: BLOCKED — historical-credit-preview-btn is inside historical-credit-dialog, which is gated on confirm-payment from FE-5.
fe_test_results.FE-7: BLOCKED — approval-code-input gated on FE-6 preview success.
fe_test_results.FE-8: BLOCKED — commit click + 403 approval_invalid not exercised; no /api/historical-credit POST captured.

action_items: URGENT: Reproduce the Checkout button → no-dialog issue locally. Likely silent guard from a precondition (unclosed-days banner, cart total validation, or paymentType state). Add a visible toast OR inline message OR console.warn when Checkout click is rejected so it doesn't fail silently — this single UX bug is gating the entire Phase 4A E2E test surface.

Confirm Tabs structure inside the Checkout dialog. iter 257 hand-off claims '[role=tab]' / 'button:has-text("Credit")' inside [role=dialog]; observed timeouts suggest tabs are either not yet mounted (lazy) or use a different DOM structure. Provide a stable data-testid for each PaymentType tab e.g. data-testid='payment-type-tab-credit'.
Address 'unclosed days detected' UX — if this is meant to block checkout, surface that explicitly on the Checkout button or dialog. If not, ensure it doesn't silently abort dialog open.
Fix dedupe-pill-wrapper pointer-events interception (carry over from iter 257).

Once Checkout dialog reliably opens, re-run FE-2/FE-4/FE-5/FE-6/FE-7/FE-8 in a single Playwright pass. Suggested data-testid additions for stability: payment-type-tab-credit, checkout-dialog-cancel-btn, checkout-dialog-root.
critical_code_review_comments: Phase 4A code itself appears correctly wired (FE-1/3/9/10/11 verified PASS in iter 257; testid tree in UnifiedSalesPage.js matches spec at lines 3587, 3611, 3626, 3638, 5837, 5882, 5905, 5977, 6014).
However, the Checkout button has no clear failure-feedback path when click is rejected — pure silent failure. Add inline disabled-with-tooltip OR a toast for every click-rejection branch.

PaymentType Tabs are mounted INSIDE Checkout dialog only (per hand-off) — this means historical-credit-banner can ONLY be triggered by going through the dialog. Consider hoisting PaymentType to the main page (sticky next to Sale Date) so the banner can flip independently and so users / E2E can switch payment type without first opening a dialog.

File size: UnifiedSalesPage.js is >6000 lines. Strongly recommend splitting into CheckoutDialog.jsx + HistoricalCreditDialog.jsx + HistoricalCreditBanner.jsx — would also make selector-based testing significantly more robust.

success_rate.frontend: 0/6 verified PASS for the requested re-run set; all 6 BLOCKED on Checkout-dialog-not-opening precondition

test_credentials: test_org_admin@regression.local / RegressionPass!2026 — login works, branch switching works
context_for_next_testing_agent: Testing agent reproduced iter 257 setup (single branch + dedupe pill hidden) but Checkout dialog NEVER opens for any of: Main Warehouse, Branch 1, Branch 2, Central Store, Main Branch with Juan Dela Cruz 633c26 + Edge Item 22be6e in cart and Sale Date=today. document.querySelector('[role=dialog]') returns null after the click. There is no toast. Main agent must (a) fix or document why the Checkout button silently fails, (b) confirm the actual selector for the Credit tab inside the dialog (the iter 257 'role=tab' / 'button:has-text(Credit)' guidance does not match observed DOM — tab click timed out at 4s), and (c) ideally add data-testid='payment-type-tab-credit', data-testid='checkout-dialog-cancel-btn', data-testid='checkout-dialog-root' for deterministic testing. Once those are in, the rest of the FE-2..FE-8 flow should run because the historical-credit-* testids and gating logic look correctly wired in UnifiedSalesPage.js.
rca of the issue: ROOT BLOCKER (this iteration): Checkout button click does NOT open the [role=dialog] in 5/5 branches tested. Without the dialog, PaymentType cannot be flipped to 'credit' from inside the dialog (per iter 257 hand-off, PaymentType Tabs render INSIDE the dialog), so the historical-credit-banner never appears, and the entire Phase 4A flow (banner → reason input → confirm-payment → historical-credit-dialog → preview → approval-code → commit → 403) is unreachable. Reproduction: login as test_org_admin@regression.local → /dashboard → click [data-testid=branch-selector] → pick any single branch (NOT 'All Branches') → /sales-new → hide [data-testid=dedupe-pill-wrapper] via display:none → type 'Juan Dela Cruz' in customer input → click button:has-text('Juan Dela Cruz 633c26') → type 'Edge Item 22be6e' in product search → click resulting tile → click button:has-text('Checkout') → wait 2.5s → document.querySelector('[role=dialog]') returns null. Additionally an 'unclosed days detected (2026-05-03 to 2026-05-08)' banner appeared on Main Warehouse — possible silent block. Mitigation for main agent: reproduce locally, audit the Checkout onClick handler for silent early-returns, add toast/tooltip on every rejection branch, and add a data-testid='checkout-dialog-root' so future tests can wait on it deterministically. Iter 257-known dedupe-pill interception still unfixed.
